title: inula gossweileri
intro: Inula gossweileri, also known as Gossweiler's elecampane, is a plant species in the sunflower family that is native to Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Inula gossweileri include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate symptoms of the common cold. Herbal preparations of Inula gossweileri can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to promote digestive health and relieve coughs.
